name: LongTai Jiang
description: LongTai Jiang 的個人網頁。就讀國立台中科技大學資訊工程科，活躍於 SCAICT、SITCON、COSCUP 等台灣資訊社群。擅長 HTML、CSS、Python，是一位熱衷於社群交流的學生開發者。
ai_instructions: This is the personal website of LongTai Jiang, a student developer from Taiwan. He studies at National Taichung University of Science and Technology (NTCUST) and is active in tech communities including SCAICT, SITCON, and COSCUP. His skills include HTML, CSS, and Python. The site contains his experiences, social links, GitHub stats, and community involvement.
